Interface Customer

All Known Implementing Classes:
David, GenericCustomer, John, KnownCustomer, Mariah, Peter, Sarah
public interface Customer
Customer defines the required behaviors for all customer types in the game. Both GenericCustomers and KnownCustomers must implement these methods.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    CDisRunning()
    Returns whether the customer's patience countdown timer is currently active.
    javafx.scene.paint.Color
    getColor()
    Returns the customer's display color.
    String
    getName()
    Returns the customer's name.
    ArrayList<Toppings>
    getOrder(ArrayList<Toppings> ingredientsList, int maxPick)
    creates the customer's order based on a list of available ingredients and the maximum number of items the customer is allowed to pick.
    String
    getShape()
    Returns shape of the customer.
    int
    patienceLevel()
    Returns how long this customer will wait before leaving.
    void
    startTimer(double time)
    Starts the customer's countdown timer.
    void
    stopTimer()
    Stops the customer's countdown timer.
    double
    timeleft()
    Returns how much time is left on the customer's countdown timer.

  • Method Details

    • getOrder

      ArrayList<Toppings> getOrder(ArrayList<Toppings> ingredientsList, int maxPick)
      creates the customer's order based on a list of available ingredients and the maximum number of items the customer is allowed to pick.
      Parameters:
      ingredientsList - : The list of all possible toppings
      maxPick - : The maximum number of toppings this customer may choose
      Returns:
      a list of toppings that make up the customer's order

    • getName

      String getName()
      Returns the customer's name.
      Returns:
      the customer's name string

    • getColor

      javafx.scene.paint.Color getColor()
      Returns the customer's display color.
      Returns:
      a Color object

    • getShape

      String getShape()
      Returns shape of the customer.
      Returns:
      the shape name as a string

    • patienceLevel

      int patienceLevel()
      Returns how long this customer will wait before leaving.
      Returns:
      patience level in seconds

    • timeleft

      double timeleft()
      Returns how much time is left on the customer's countdown timer.
      Returns:
      time remaining in seconds

    • startTimer

      void startTimer(double time)
      Starts the customer's countdown timer.
      Parameters:
      time - the number of seconds to count down from

    • stopTimer

      void stopTimer()
      Stops the customer's countdown timer.

    • CDisRunning

      boolean CDisRunning()
      Returns whether the customer's patience countdown timer is currently active.
      Returns:
      true if the countdown is running; false otherwise
